question: Any Tesla arsonist found guilty in 2025?
resolution_criteria:
Recently, there have been a spate of arson attacks on Teslas and Tesla facilities. You can read more about that here: https://abcnews.go.com/Business/video/investigation-underway-apparent-tesla-arson-attacks-119962366

This market will resolve to "Yes" if at least one person is found guilty of arson involving a Tesla facility or property, or any vehicle owned or produced by Tesla, between March 20 and December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

This market will resolve according to the initial judgment rendered a relevant case. Any appeals will have no bearing on the resolution of this market.

The primary resolution source will be an official judgement delivered a the ruling court; however, other credible reporting may be used.
